leadText: The Shoal Salt (Japanese: あさせのしお Shoal Salt) is a type of item introduced in Generation III. In Hoenn, it can be used along with Shoal Shells to make Shell Bells.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Hoenn , the player can give four Shoal Salt and four Shoal Shells to the old man in Shoal Cave to make a Shell Bell .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Salt obtained deep inside the Shoal Cave . FR LG Pure salt obtained from deep inside the Shoal Cave . It is extremely salty. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt HG SS Pure salt that was discovered deep inside the Shoal Cave. It is extremely salty. B W B2 W2 Pure salt that can be discovered deep inside the Shoal Cave. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y Pure salt that can be discovered only deep inside the Shoal Cave. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA Salt that you found inside Shoal Cave. S V Salt that was found inside Shoal Cave.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM N/A $ 10 In the Generation V games, the Shoal Salt can be sold to the gourmet maniac on Route 5 for $ 7000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Hoenn , the player can give four Shoal Salt and four Shoal Shells to the old man in Shoal Cave to make a Shell Bell . Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Shoal Cave (low tide, ×4) FR LG Trade Colo XD Trade D P Pt Pal Park HG SS Pal Park B W Route 13 (treasure hunter) B2 W2 Route 17 ( reappears occasionally ) X Y Trade OR AS Shoal Cave (low tide, ×4)

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Due to a mistake in the Pokémon Diamond and Pearl: Official Nintendo Player's Guide , there was a rumor that the Shoal Salt functions like the Leftovers in Generation IV . However, this was an error; the Shell Bell (which is created from Shoal Salt and Shoal Shells) is the item that functions similarly to Leftovers.
